COLLECTOR-ARROGANCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Your next Attack this turn also applies {DoomedAttackPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold].
COLLECTOR-ARROGANCE.title: Arrogance
COLLECTOR-ASHEN_STRIKE.title: Ashen Strike
COLLECTOR-BELLOW_COLLECTOR.title: Bellow
COLLECTOR-BELLOW_COLLECTOR.description:
Apply [gold]Doom[/gold] equal to unused [gold]Block[/gold] last turn.
(Applies {UnusedBlock:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold])
COLLECTOR-BILLOW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, add [gold]Bellow[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
COLLECTOR-BILLOW.title: Billow
COLLECTOR-BINDING_CALL.description:
[gold]Kindle[/gold] {Summon:diff()}.
After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead[/gold] applies {BindingCallPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to a random enemy.
COLLECTOR-BINDING_CALL.title: Binding Call
COLLECTOR-BLACK_BINDINGS.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], then apply {CollectorDoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] for each unique debuff on the enemy.
COLLECTOR-BLACK_BINDINGS.title: Black Bindings
COLLECTOR-BLIGHTNING.title: Blightning
COLLECTOR-BLIGHTNING.description:
Apply {CollectorDoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold].
Apply {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your Collected pile.
COLLECTOR-BLIND.title: Blind
COLLECTOR-BONFIRE.title: Bonfire
COLLECTOR-BRAIN_DRAIN.description:
Enemy loses {Damage:diff()} HP.
Add their Collected card into your Hand{IfUpgraded:show: and Upgrade it|}.
COLLECTOR-BRAIN_DRAIN.title: Brain Drain
COLLECTOR-BRAMBLESPAR_KINDLING.descripti: When [gold]Exhausted[/gold], add a [gold]Burning Strike {IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
COLLECTOR-BRAMBLESPAR_KINDLING.title: Bramblespar Kindling
COLLECTOR-BURNING_STRIKE.title: Burning Strike
COLLECTOR-CANT_TOUCH_THIS.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
When you fully block an attack, apply {CantTouchThisPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to the attacker.
COLLECTOR-CANT_TOUCH_THIS.title: Can't Touch This
COLLECTOR-COFFIN_NAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold], return it to your [gold]Hand[/gold] next turn with {Increase:diff()} more damage.
COLLECTOR-COFFIN_NAIL.title: Coffin Nail
COLLECTOR-COLLECTIBLE.title: Collectible
COLLECTOR-CONDEMN.title: Condemn
COLLECTOR-CURSED_WAIL.description:
ALL enemies lose {TemporaryStrengthDownPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Afflicted[/gold] enemies lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
COLLECTOR-CURSED_WAIL.title: Cursed Wail
COLLECTOR-DARKSTORM.description:
Gain a [gold]Blightning[/gold].
Shuffle {Cards:diff()} more into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
COLLECTOR-DARKSTORM.title: Darkstorm
COLLECTOR-DARKWILLOW_KINDLING.title: Darkwillow Kindling
COLLECTOR-DARK_APOTHEOSIS.description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] the Collected pile for the rest of combat.
COLLECTOR-DARK_APOTHEOSIS.title: Dark Apotheosis
COLLECTOR-DARK_LORD_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, play [gold]You Are Mine{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] on a random enemy.
COLLECTOR-DARK_LORD_FORM.title: Dark Lord Form
COLLECTOR-DEATHMARK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Next turn, enemey loses HP equal to twice the unblocked damage dealt
COLLECTOR-DEATHMARK.title: Deathmark
COLLECTOR-DEFEND_COLLECTOR.title: Defend
COLLECTOR-DOUBLE_TROUBLE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Your next Collected card this turn is played twice.
COLLECTOR-DOUBLE_TROUBLE.title: Double Trouble
COLLECTOR-DRAGONS_TROVE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards from your Collected pile.
Gain {Reserve:diff()} [gold]Reserve[/gold].
COLLECTOR-DRAGONS_TROVE.title: Dragon's Trove
COLLECTOR-EMBER.title: Ember
COLLECTOR-EMPOWER.description: Gain X Strength at the start of your next {Turns:diff()} turns.
COLLECTOR-EMPOWER.title: Empower
COLLECTOR-FEEL_MY_PAIN.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, a random enemy loses {FeelMyPainPower:diff()} HP.
COLLECTOR-FEEL_MY_PAIN.title: Feel My Pain
COLLECTOR-FIEND_FIRE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
COLLECTOR-FIEND_FIRE.title: Fiend Fire
COLLECTOR-FINALIZE.description:
When the enemy dies, heal {FinalizePower:diff()} HP.
Apply {CollectorDoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold].
COLLECTOR-FINALIZE.title: Finalize
COLLECTOR-FINGER_OF_DEATH.description:
Only [gold]Reserves[/gold] may be spent on this.
Apply {CollectorDoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show: to ALL enemies|}.
COLLECTOR-FINGER_OF_DEATH.title: Finger of Death
COLLECTOR-FLAME_LASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, then add [gold]Pyred[/gold] card's damage to this.
COLLECTOR-FLAME_LASH.title: Flame Lash
COLLECTOR-FLASH.title: Flash
COLLECTOR-FLEETING_EMBERS.title: Fleeting Embers
COLLECTOR-FORGERY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose 1 of {Cards:diff()} cards from your Collected pile to gain a copy of.
COLLECTOR-FORGERY.title: Forgery
COLLECTOR-FUEL_THE_FIRE.description: Next turn, gain {ReserveNextTurnPower:diff()} [gold]Reserve[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: and draw a card|}.
COLLECTOR-FUEL_THE_FIRE.title: Fuel the Fire
COLLECTOR-GOODBYE.title: Goodbye
COLLECTOR-GREATER_HURTING.title: Greater Hurting
COLLECTOR-GREATER_HURTING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain a [gold]Greatest Hurting[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+|}.
COLLECTOR-GREATEST_HURTING.title: Greatest Hurting
COLLECTOR-GREATEST_HURTING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this card is Exhausted, gain an [gold]Ember[/gold].
COLLECTOR-GREENPYRE_LOCUS.description: Choose 1 of 3 Collected cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add {Cards:diff()} copies of it into your Collected pile.
COLLECTOR-GREENPYRE_LOCUS.title: Greenpyre Locus
COLLECTOR-HEAT_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain an [gold]Ember[/gold].
COLLECTOR-HEAT_WAVE.title: Heat Wave
COLLECTOR-HOARD.title: Hoard
COLLECTOR-HOARDERS_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play the top card of your Collected pile.
COLLECTOR-HOARDERS_STRIKE.title: Hoarder's Strike
COLLECTOR-HURTING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain a [gold]Greater Hurting[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+|}.
COLLECTOR-HURTING.title: Hurting
COLLECTOR-ILL_TAKE_THAT.description:
[gold]Steal[/gold] up to {IllTakeThat:diff()} of the enemy's [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
COLLECTOR-ILL_TAKE_THAT.title: I'll Take That
COLLECTOR-INEVITABLE_DEMISE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Prevent the next time [gold]Doom[/gold] would be removed from the target.
COLLECTOR-INEVITABLE_DEMISE.title: Inevitable Demise
COLLECTOR-INFLICT_AGONY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is not [gold]Afflicted[/gold], apply 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
COLLECTOR-INFLICT_AGONY.title: Inflict Agony
COLLECTOR-IRONBARK_KINDLING.title: Ironbark Kindling
COLLECTOR-IT_MATTERS_NOT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Increase ALL enemy [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] by {ItMattersNot:diff()}.
COLLECTOR-IT_MATTERS_NOT.title: It Matters Not
COLLECTOR-JADED_JABS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Shivs[/gold] equal to [gold]Pyred[/gold] card's cost + {JadedJabs:diff()}.
COLLECTOR-JADED_JABS.title: Jaded Jabs
COLLECTOR-KARMA.description:
At the end of your turn, gain {MetallicizePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If an enemy is [gold]Afflicted[/gold], gain {KarmaPower:diff()} more.
COLLECTOR-KARMA.title: Karma
COLLECTOR-LANTERN_FLARE.description:
Apply {CollectorDoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold].
Enemy gains {ScorchedPower:diff()} more at the end of each of its turns.
COLLECTOR-LANTERN_FLARE.title: Lantern Flare
COLLECTOR-LUCKY_WICK.title: Lucky Wick
COLLECTOR-MINI_CURSE.title: Mini-Curse
COLLECTOR-MISDIRECT.title: Misdirect
COLLECTOR-MYSTERY_WEAVING.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Grants {CalculationExtra:diff()} less [gold]Block[/gold] for each other card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
COLLECTOR-MYSTERY_WEAVING.title: Mystery Weaving
COLLECTOR-OAKBRIM_KINDLING.title: Oakbrim Kindling
COLLECTOR-OMEN.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Innate.
|}Whenever you play a Collected card, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
COLLECTOR-OMEN.title: Omen
COLLECTOR-PROTECTING_CALL.description:
[gold]Kindle[/gold] {Summon:diff()}.
After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead [/gold]gives you {ProtectingCallPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
COLLECTOR-PROTECTING_CALL.title: Protecting Call
COLLECTOR-PYROMANCY.description: At the start of your turn, gain {PyromancyPower:diff()} [gold]Reserve[/gold].
COLLECTOR-PYROMANCY.title: Pyromancy
COLLECTOR-RAGING_CALL.description:
[gold]Kindle[/gold] {Summon:diff()}.
After you play an Attack, [gold]Torchhead[/gold] deals {RagingCallPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
COLLECTOR-RAGING_CALL.title: Raging Call
COLLECTOR-RECEIVE_TRIBUTE.description: Choose 1 of {Cards:diff()} Boss cards to gain. It gains Retain.
COLLECTOR-RECEIVE_TRIBUTE.title: Receive Tribute
COLLECTOR-ROAST.title: Roast
COLLECTOR-ROTWOOD_KINDLING.description: When [gold]Exhausted[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable and {CollectorDoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to ALL enemies.
COLLECTOR-ROTWOOD_KINDLING.title: Rotwood Kindling
COLLECTOR-SCORCHING_RAY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy X times.
COLLECTOR-SCORCHING_RAY.title: Scorching Ray
COLLECTOR-SEED_OF_DOUBT.description:
Apply {CollectorDoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold].
Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold] when this is in Hand, increase its [gold]Doom[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}.
COLLECTOR-SEED_OF_DOUBT.title: Seed of Doubt
COLLECTOR-SEVER_SOUL.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all non-Attack cards in your Hand
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
COLLECTOR-SEVER_SOUL.title: Sever Soul
COLLECTOR-SHADOW_DAGGERS.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage for each Collected card played this combat.
COLLECTOR-SHADOW_DAGGERS.title: Shadow Daggers
COLLECTOR-SHOOTING_STAR.description:
The first time you [gold]Pyre[/gold] an Attack each turn, gain a copy of it.
It costs 0 until played.
COLLECTOR-SHOOTING_STAR.title: Shooting Star
COLLECTOR-SOMBER_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain a copy of the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card.
COLLECTOR-SOMBER_SHIELD.title: Somber Shield
COLLECTOR-SOULFORGE.description:
Draw a card from your Collected pile.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Upgraded[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:copies|copy} of it.
COLLECTOR-SOULFORGE.title: Soulforge
COLLECTOR-SPIRIT_LEECH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Afflicted[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
COLLECTOR-SPIRIT_LEECH.title: Spirit Leech
COLLECTOR-STASH_AWAY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] X times.
Next turn, gain X [gold]Reserve[/gold].
COLLECTOR-STASH_AWAY.title: Stash Away
COLLECTOR-STRIKE_COLLECTOR.title: Strike
COLLECTOR-SUCKER_PUNCH.title: Sucker Punch
COLLECTOR-SUFFERING.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Weak[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy, also apply {SufferingPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to them.
COLLECTOR-SUFFERING.title: Suffering
COLLECTOR-SUNBLOOM_KINDLING.description: When [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Embers[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
COLLECTOR-SUNBLOOM_KINDLING.title: Sunbloom Kindling
COLLECTOR-THORN_WHIP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Gain a [gold]Shiv[/gold].
COLLECTOR-THORN_WHIP.title: Thorn Whip
COLLECTOR-TORCHBEARER.title: Torchbearer
COLLECTOR-TRIP.title: Trip
COLLECTOR-VOID_ARMOR.title: Void Armor
COLLECTOR-WHIRLING_FLAME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
COLLECTOR-WHIRLING_FLAME.title: Whirling Flame
COLLECTOR-WHOMP.title: Whomp
COLLECTOR-WILDFIRE.description: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each unique debuff on the enemy.
COLLECTOR-WILDFIRE.title: Wildfire
COLLECTOR-YOU_ARE_MINE.title: You Are Mine!
